CustomField.description: Give value as 'Revenue' if condition is Type = 'Revenue' Give value as ('Revenue','Renewal') if condition is Type IN ('Revenue','Renewal') Give values as Today , Today()+5 , 2019-06-21T00:00:00Z for Date fields like CreatedDate
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Give value as 'Revenue' if condition is Type = 'Revenue' Give value as ('Revenue','Renewal') if condition is Type IN ('Revenue','Renewal') Give values as Today , Today()+5 , 2019-06-21T00:00:00Z for Date fields like CreatedDate
CustomField.label: OrderValue
